Project Description: Water treatment improvements including a package aeration,detention and filtration systems.
New water treatment plant, demolition of existing plant, new forcemain and lift station for backwash disposal.
Reconfiguration of Well #4 and install transmission main to removePFAS.
Drill a new Well #8 to replace Well #4.
Construct a new iron Filtration Plant at site of Well #9.
Construction of a iron filtration plant at Well #8.
Construct new Well #4 including pump and building. Replace Well#3building. Abandon Well #1 and its building.
